post.content: Hi, I had my first round on 13th September 2024, which involved a problem to find suitable robot postion in the grid. I haven\u2019t received any feedback yet and was wondering if this is typical. How long should I wait before following up, and is there a standard timeline for hearing back after an interview? Any advice would be appreciated!\nThanks in advance!
Can you please share a little more about the robot position question?
Hello, could you please elaborate on the "Robot Position" problem? Thanks!
For me it took ~8 days. Have you emailed your rec?
